rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MARIE BARNSON KARNAZES VS. ISERVE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 10, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT CITIMORTGAGE, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to contract-based causes of action; SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to Intentional Tort; SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege fraud with particularity and damages re: promise to keep loan with moving defendants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAIRO INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. BANK OF THE WEST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Dismiss First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 10, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST's Motion To Dismiss First Amended Complaint Hearing Required to address (1)Non-compliance with CRC 3.1112 and (2)why venue should not transfer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIGID CRILLY, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO MARIE FIRL VS. ANGELA THOMAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 10, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT ANGELA THOMAS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to October 7, 2014 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE MARIE ANNUZZI et al VS. HENRY FONG PAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 10, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT HENRY PAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to October 15, 2014 for moving party to provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than September 15, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party and its counsel must comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C in the future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE MARIE ANNUZZI et al VS. HENRY FONG PAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 10, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT HENRY PAN's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to October 15, 2014 for moving party to provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than September 15, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party and its counsel must comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C in the future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARKET STREET REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC VS. NAM INVESTMENTS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 10, 2014, line 6. CROSS DEFENDANTs MARKET STREET REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC, SANSOME STREET ADVISORS, INC, ROBERT DUMAS and WARO LLC's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend causes of actions 1, 2, 3 to allege facts to support reasonable reliance in light of Rosenthal vs. Great Western Fin. (1996) 14 Cal 4th 394 and damages. SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to elder abuse; the property is that of NAM not of Mar. See Sonoma Foods. = (501/REQ)
